title: How do I trim messages stored in memory before invoking?

posts.author: Younes
posts.body:
In the
docs
it speaks about how to trim messages for short term memory in order to not exceed token windows. The problem is that the documentation is outdated. The ‘preModelHook‘ option is not available anymore. My question is, how can I do the same with the current version of langchain?

posts.author: pawel-twardziak
Younes
pawel-twardziak
posts.body:
checkpointer: this.checkpointer,
is the memory.
If the middleware does not work, there must be sth wrong with its implementation.

posts.author: Younes
pawel-twardziak
posts.body:
I meant the middleware implementation.
Could you share your entire code so that I could asses and test whether it is an implementation issue?

posts.author: Younes
